reviews.review_description: Okay so there was a admin so I tried to see if this one sentence will worked to convince him for me to get it so I was saying if you give me admin I will start post videos on YouTube to advertise and he said no then kick me like why you got to kick me I was just doing that sentence I don’t know what the username is but not a good admin but this was like a year ago or something like that but pls show that admin some respect

reviews.review_title: This game is good, BRING IT BACK.
reviews.review_description:
I think this game was good. So WHY did you stop working on it. I would understand why you would stop updating the game, but you should at least have kept it on the last version that the game was on. And not just remove everything. I don't need any more of this game. I just need parkour mania to be how it was. 
 -yuh13

I have loved this game since it came out and the moderators are so fun and nice this is a really good game with multiple parkour levels I hope on day I can be a moderator.
But this is the best fan gorilla tag fan game in my opinion five star.

Download now this game is so fun I got a friend from this game and there is good graphics. I hope I become a moderator some day I hope there are some good future updates good work Xenix/sorry if I spelt your name wrong. Bye and have a nice day. Back with an update and I was playing and my game glitched and then I was in the mod vents and two kids reported me and said I purposely went in there and sorry I hope I don’t get banned

developer_response.body: That’s just the owner, please give a bigger star review plsplsplspls

reviews.review_title: Good but the parkour is extremely hard
reviews.review_description: This game is fun, but the parkour is very hard and also the mods sometimes fling and kick you but parkour is fun￼￼

developer_response.body: Ill tell the mods to stop, and yes I agree myself, I made the parkour very hard for some people looking for a challenge. Thats why i added checkpoints
